_comment: v7.1 — minimal ESLint config focused on the JWT-orchestrator chokepoint enforcement (codex pass-3 WARNING #5). Routes under app/api/runs/** MUST go through @/lib/upload/auth's verifyTokenAndAssertRunMembership() — they may NOT import the bare verifier from @/lib/upload/jwt directly. TokenError + UploadTokenClaims type imports are still permitted for typed catch / signature purposes.

paths.name: @/lib/upload/jwt
paths.message: v7.1: ingest routes MUST use verifyTokenAndAssertRunMembership() from '@/lib/upload/auth'. The bare verifier skips the per-request membership re-check (codex pass-3 WARNING #5).
